title: Plan Product Signal Report result projection
objective: Define the boundary for a future API-owned Product Signal Report projection so the UI can later render full Founder report sections without inventing data or changing sibling repos.

include: Document the gap between the current verdict-style API result and the target Product Signal Report.
Define the preferred additive API-owned report projection boundary.
Define the future optional UI wrapper shape around job result responses.
Preserve existing API and extension compatibility rules.
Update AI delivery state and verification records.
exclude: API endpoint, DTO, prompt, migration, or telemetry implementation.
Saved reports, auth, billing, routing, or deployment.

done: The current verdict-result gap is explicit.
The future optional report wrapper shape is defined.
Existing API and extension compatibility rules are preserved.
No runtime source files or sibling repos were changed.
AI delivery state and verification records were updated.
